message:
fix(codegen): Fix missing __base_value__ initialization and struct field ordering

Fixed two codegen issues affecting core2 tests:

1. Missing __base_value__ initialization in __new__-only classes
   - When a class has __new__(cls) with no extra params, codegen was
     generating `.__base_value__ = ,` (missing value)
   - Fix: Use builtin_base.init_args[0].default when no params found
   - File: src/codegen/native/statements/functions/generators/body/class_methods.zig:1630-1653

2. Struct fields after declarations (Zig requirement violation)
   - HTTPConnection stub had `response_buf` field after methods
   - Zig requires all fields before all declarations (pub const, pub fn)
   - Fix: Restructured conn_fields and conn_decls to emit fields first
   - File: src/codegen/native/http_mod.zig:28-42

These fixes resolve compilation errors in test_dict, test_docxmlrpc, and
other core2 tests that use dict subclasses or HTTP mocks.
